title: Escalation Handling Guidelines
content: Any complaint that mentions a lawyer, legal action, a regulator, or a demand for a manager must be escalated to a specialist. Do not close the case; explain that a specialist will follow up.

title: Charges and Refund Review
content: Duplicate or incorrect charges on a card, invoice, or subscription are reviewed by the finance team. Do not approve refunds directly; explain the review will happen and the team will follow up.

title: Respectful Communication Standard
content: Stay calm and empathetic with upset customers. Never guarantee an outcome. Always state the next step clearly.
